CustomField.formula: IF(AND( TEXT(Status__c) == 'Approved', TEXT(Organizer__c) == '3rd Party Organized', with_Symposium__c == false ), $Label.hippoRegistered, CASE(Status__c,"Approved",$Label.hippoApproved,"Draft",$Label.hippoDraft,"Rejected",$Label.hippoRejected,"Cancelled",$Label.hippoCancelled,"Completed",$Label.hippoCompleted,"Terminated",$Label.hippoTerminated,"Sent to Approval",$Label.hippoSentToApproval,"NA"))
CustomField.label: Status
